commentaries.author: Ambrose of Milan
commentaries.content: The wall is the church and the towers are her priests, who have full power to teach both the natural and the moral sciences. - "Six Days of Creation 6.8.49"

commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content:
The vineyard which is the Church, was given to the spiritual Solomon, which is Christ.
Baal-hamon means 'in believers.' (St. Cyril of Alexandria)

commentaries.author: Cyril of Alexandria
commentaries.content: The vineyard which, it says, was given to the spiritual Solomon is surely the church. And we have already said that Baal-hamon means “in believers.” For who believed, apart from those who accepted his commandments? - "Fragments in the Commentary on the Song of Songs 8.11"

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: The. The bridegroom, in the character of a countryman, asserts that he would not give his vineyard or spouse (Calmet) for all the king's riches.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
